# Untitled Mixed Media

## About
Untitled Mixed Media is a hand-painted mural and sign business based in Richmond, Virginia, operated by Spencer Bennett. Everything is hand-painted. No vinyl, no digital printing. Landmarks, not lookalikes.

## Services

### Hand-Painted Murals
Custom hand-painted murals for businesses, property owners, and public spaces. Interior and exterior. Price range: $3,000 - $100,000+.
URL: https://untitledmixedmedia.com/murals

### Hand-Painted Signs
Hand-painted signs, gold leaf lettering, window lettering, and sign restoration. Price range: $500 - $10,000+.
URL: https://untitledmixedmedia.com/hand-painted-signs

### The Brand Mark
Your logo, hand-painted on wall or wood panel. One day. Starting at $500.
URL: https://untitledmixedmedia.com/brand-mark

### Mural Cost Estimator
Free interactive tool to estimate mural costs based on wall size, surface type, and design complexity.
URL: https://untitledmixedmedia.com/mural-cost-estimator

## Service Area
Richmond, Virginia metro area. Travels for larger commissions.

## Contact
Email: hello@untitledmixedmedia.com
Website: https://untitledmixedmedia.com
Contact form: https://untitledmixedmedia.com/contact
